title: Binisutoy: Without Strings
overview: Kajal and Sraboni, two people in their mid-thirties, meet at a reality game show audition. A freak accident injures Sraboni and Kajal takes her to the doctor. On the way, they share two engrossing stories from their lives which culminates in an ironic altercation between them.
